text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While many predict Biwa Hayahide will win the
Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many fans also support Matikanetannhauser
because of how relatable and encouraging she is,
calling her a champion of the ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and Tokai Teio shake hands in the
runners' tunnel. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike all the times in her classic year when she
hid off to the side, Matikanetannhauser gets right
in the thick of it, proudly announcing that she's
running as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Natures joins in, and the four of them
acknowledge each other's prowess. And with that,
this year's Arima Kinen finally begins!
